Code fragment: public final TableField<SlfPaymentsXdsdRecord, String> FAILREASON = createField(DSL.name("failReason"), org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.CLOB.nullable(false), this, "");
Explanation: The FAILREASON column is marked as NOT NULL, but a failure reason only makes sense when a payment fails. For successful payments, this column should be NULL rather than requiring a placeholder value. Consider making this column nullable to properly represent the absence of a failure reason.
